aliases.description: Aliases to add to the DNA sequence

annotations.description: Annotations to create on the DNA sequence.

authorIds.description: IDs of users to set as the DNA sequence's authors.

bases.description: Base pairs for the DNA sequence.

customFields.description: Custom fields to add to the DNA sequence. Every field should have its name as a key, mapping to an object with information about the value of the field.

fields.description: Fields to set on the DNA sequence. Must correspond with the schema's field definitions. Every field should have its name as a key, mapping to an object with information about the value of the field.

folderId.description: ID of the folder containing the DNA sequence.

isCircular.description: Whether the DNA sequence is circular or linear.

schemaId.description: ID of the DNA sequence's schema.

translations.description: Translations to create on the DNA sequence. Translations are specified by either a combination of 'start' and 'end' fields, or a list of regions. Both cannot be provided.
